rationale: The proposed change concerns a property tax homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §28.0065 governs an adaptive vocabulary assessment pilot program. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: The agency shall develop and implement an adaptive vocabulary assessment pilot program to assess vocabulary development in students in kindergarten through third grade.
_note: No overlap between proposed tax-code change and education assessment statute.
